title: Floating glob
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Floatingglob.jpg|thumb]]
A '''floating glob''' was a [[Bioengineering/Legends|bio-construct]] which cleaned up waste on [[Charon/Legends|Charon]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. They had four tendrils that pulled waste into hollow bodies where [[Acid/Legends|acid]] sacs secrete acids to break the waste down into a usable nutrient paste.

==Appearances==
*[[Otherspace (adventure)|''Otherspace'']]
